name: Pawn Now
description_short: Pawn Now is a multi-location Arizona pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, buying, and selling of jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, and precious metals without credit checks.
description_long:
Pawn Now has operated in the Phoenix metropolitan area for over 25–30 years (website sources vary between 25 and 30 years), establishing itself as a established pawn broker with multiple Valley locations including Phoenix, Mesa, Chandler, Apache Junction, and Scottsdale. The company operates as a traditional pawn shop, offering customers the ability to pawn items as collateral for immediate cash loans, sell items outright, or purchase pre-owned merchandise from their inventory.

The company accepts a broad range of collateral including jewelry and diamonds, precious metals (gold and silver), musical instruments, electronics, firearms, tools, and construction equipment. Pawn Now markets its services as a fast, accessible alternative to traditional lending for customers facing short-term financial needs. The business also operates an eBay store for online sales and maintains an inventory across multiple physical locations with what they describe as "enormous storage capabilities" and security systems.

Pawn Now distinguishes itself by emphasizing the non-credit-reporting nature of pawn loans—unpaid loans result in loss of the item but do not negatively impact credit scores. The company highlights 25+ years of operational history, trained and experienced brokers, competitive rates, and multiple convenient Valley-wide locations. Customer reviews on their website mention friendly, helpful staff and quick transaction processing. The company positions itself as serving North Phoenix residents and broader Phoenix-area communities during financial challenges.

As a pawn shop, Pawn Now is fundamentally a collateral-based lending and goods resale business, not a credit repair, debt relief, or alternative lending platform. Customers should understand that pawning items means risking loss of personal property if loans are not repaid, and that pawn loan terms (interest rates, repayment periods) are not detailed on their website. The company's value proposition relies on speed and accessibility rather than credit-building or financial improvement services.
address: 1145 S Mesa Dr UNIT 4, Mesa, AZ 85210

company_info.headquarters: 1145 S Mesa Dr UNIT 4, Mesa, AZ 85210

pros: No credit check required for pawn loans—accessible to those with poor or no credit history
Unpaid pawn loans do not negatively impact credit scores, unlike traditional loans
Fast transaction processing described as quick and helpful by customers
8 Valley-wide locations across Phoenix, Mesa, Chandler, Apache Junction, and Scottsdale for convenience
Accepts wide variety of collateral including jewelry, electronics, tools, firearms, and musical instruments
25+ years of operational history and established reputation in Arizona market
Additional revenue stream through eBay store and secondary market sales
Trained and experienced brokers for item evaluation
cons: Risk of permanent loss of personal property if loan is not repaid—items are kept and resold
Specific interest rates, APRs, and loan term details are not disclosed on the website
Pawn loans are short-term solutions that do not build credit or help long-term financial stability
No mention of loan amounts, repayment periods, or how collateral value is determined
Limited transparency on pricing and competitive rate claims without posted rate examples
best_for: Individuals with poor credit or no credit history who need fast cash access
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools) seeking immediate liquidity without credit reporting
Short-term financial bridge needs until next paycheck or income arrives
Sellers of used merchandise including jewelry, musical instruments, and electronics
diagnosis: Pawn Now is best for customers facing immediate short-term cash needs who own valuable items and have poor or no credit history—the main caveat is that pawning items risks permanent loss of personal property and does not build credit or provide long-term financial solutions. Loan terms, rates, and specific amounts are not transparently disclosed, so customers should contact the business directly for pricing details before committing.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry and diamonds
Pawn loans on precious metals including gold and silver
Pawn loans on firearms and guns
Pawn loans on tools and construction equipment
Purchase and sale of used jewelry, diamonds, and precious metals
Purchase and sale of used firearms
Purchase and sale of used electronics
Purchase and sale of used musical instruments
Purchase and sale of used tools and construction equipment
